name: builder
description: A list of HETEROGENEOUS typed blocks (Filament's Builder): unlike the repeater (the same schema repeated), a builder mixes DIFFERENT block types in one ordered list (a page builder: heading | paragraph | image), chosen from an add-block menu. Each block carries a hidden `<name>[<i>][__type]` plus its type-specific fields named `<name>[<i>][...]`, POSTing as a typed indexed form-array the server rebuilds into an ordered list of typed records, with zero JS. The block bodies are RECURSIVE content slots the adopter authors (existing blocks via the builder.block sub-partial, one blank `<template data-builder-template=type>` per type for the clone). JS-OFF the add-block menu is a row of submit buttons one per type (name=`<name>__addblock`, value=type) and per-block remove is a submit (name=`<name>__remove`, value=index), both server round-trips -- a working no-JS path. JS-ON a CSP-clean typed-TS enhancer clones the matching per-type template on add and drops a card on remove, in place, then re-indexes every field name (the __type included) + label so indices stay contiguous. The native inputs stay the form source of truth. WAI-ARIA: labelled fieldset/legend, a labelled add-block menu of typed buttons, each card a labelled region, labelled remove, aria-live. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the builder partial (lievit/builder.jte, reached as @template.lievit.builder(name=..., blockTypes=..., blocksContent=@`...`)), the builder.block sub-partial (lievit/builder/block.jte, one typed block card) and the CSP-clean enhancer (lievit/builder.enhancer.ts). Import the enhancer once and call enhanceAllBuilders() on load (and after a DOM swap). Pass `blockTypes` (type key -> menu label Map), `count`, render existing blocks in `blocksContent` (loop your records, each a @template.lievit.builder.block), and author one blank full block card per type in `templates` as `<template data-builder-template=type>` using the `__i__` index token. JS-OFF add is the per-type submit (`<name>__addblock`, value=type) and remove is `<name>__remove` (value=index); JS-ON the enhancer clones the matching template / drops a card in place and re-indexes (the hidden `__type` included). The enhancer is self-contained (it inlines the index-rewrite helper, no cross-file import). Requires the icon partial (plus, trash-2). The source is yours: edit freely.
